chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No.D-1320 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(s) For orders on office objections. For hearing of main case. 21-09-2023 Mr. Bilawal Ali Ghunio advocate for petitioner. Mr. Rafiq Ahmed Dahri, Assistant Advocate General along with Sohail Ahmed Patoli, Assistant Director SPSC. ---- Comments filed on behalf of respondents No.2 to 4 are taken on record. The petitioner has filed this petition with a prayer that the respondents/Sindh Public Service Commission be directed to conduct interview of the petitioner which was scheduled to be held on 31.08.2023. This petition was filed on 30.08.2023 a day before interview and notices were ordered. The petitioner was overage to the extent of four years, seven months and twenty seven days. It is only claimed that a request for age relaxation has already been made to the Government of Sindh, Services, General Administration and Coordination Department and to such extent a certificate was also issued that a request for upper age relaxation of seven years is under process. We have been informed by learned AAG that process of recruitment of Staff Nurse BPS-16 has already been matured and required number of posts are; 23 for Rural and 15 for Urban (total 38) both male and female, for which result has been published and candidates have been interviewed and vested rights to them have been accrued. There are numerous applications, as stated by AAG, pending for such age relaxation and none of them is decided. This petition is not for such exercise. Hence, the rights have already accrued to those whose result has been announced and this petition merits no consideration for compelling Commission to conduct petitioner’s interview.

This petition is not for such exercise. Hence, the rights have already accrued to those whose result has been announced and this petition merits no consideration for compelling Commission to conduct petitioner’s interview. The petition stands dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE Irfan Ali
